verses.greek: Παῦλος καὶ Τιμόθεος δοῦλοι ⸂Χριστοῦ Ἰησοῦ⸃ πᾶσιν τοῖς ἁγίοις ἐν Χριστῷ Ἰησοῦ τοῖς οὖσιν ἐν Φιλίπποις σὺν ἐπισκόποις καὶ διακόνοις·
verses.mistral: Paul and Timothy, servants of Christ Jesus, To all the saints in Christ Jesus who are in Philippi, along with the overseers and deacons:
verses.kjv: Paul and Timotheus, the servants of Jesus Christ, to all the saints in Christ Jesus which are at Philippi, with the bishops and deacons:

verses.greek: χάρις ὑμῖν καὶ εἰρήνη ἀπὸ θεοῦ πατρὸς ἡμῶν καὶ κυρίου Ἰησοῦ Χριστοῦ.
verses.mistral: Grace and peace from God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ.
verses.kjv: Grace be unto you, and peace, from God our Father, and from the Lord Jesus Christ.

verses.greek: Εὐχαριστῶ τῷ θεῷ μου ἐπὶ πάσῃ τῇ μνείᾳ ὑμῶν
verses.mistral: I thank God for your memories.
verses.kjv: I thank my God upon every remembrance of you,

words.gloss: on, to, against, on the basis of, at

verses.greek: πάντοτε ἐν πάσῃ δεήσει μου ὑπὲρ πάντων ὑμῶν, μετὰ χαρᾶς τὴν δέησιν ποιούμενος,
verses.mistral: Constantly in every prayer of mine for all of you, I offer the request with joy.
verses.kjv: Always in every prayer of mine for you all making request with joy,

verses.greek: ἐπὶ τῇ κοινωνίᾳ ὑμῶν εἰς τὸ εὐαγγέλιον ἀπὸ ⸀τῆς πρώτης ἡμέρας ἄχρι τοῦ νῦν,
verses.mistral: In partnership with you for the Gospel from the first day until now
verses.kjv: For your fellowship in the gospel from the first day until now;

words.gloss: on, to, against, on the basis of, at
as far as, up to, until

verses.greek: πεποιθὼς αὐτὸ τοῦτο ὅτι ὁ ἐναρξάμενος ἐν ὑμῖν ἔργον ἀγαθὸν ἐπιτελέσει ἄχρι ἡμέρας ⸂Χριστοῦ Ἰησοῦ⸃·
verses.mistral: Having confidence in this, that the one who began a good work in you will continue to complete it until the day of Christ Jesus.
verses.kjv: Being confident of this very thing, that he which hath begun a good work in you will perform it until the day of Jesus Christ:

words.gloss: as far as, up to, until

verses.greek: καθώς ἐστιν δίκαιον ἐμοὶ τοῦτο φρονεῖν ὑπὲρ πάντων ὑμῶν, διὰ τὸ ἔχειν με ἐν τῇ καρδίᾳ ὑμᾶς, ἔν τε τοῖς δεσμοῖς μου καὶ ἐν τῇ ἀπολογίᾳ καὶ βεβαιώσει τοῦ εὐαγγελίου συγκοινωνούς μου τῆς χάριτος πάντας ὑμᾶς ὄντας·
verses.mistral: This is just right for me to think this way concerning all of you, because in my heart you are all partakers of my grace. Both in my bonds and in my defense I will make it clear that all of you are participants in the gospel's grace.
verses.kjv: Even as it is meet for me to think this of you all, because I have you in my heart; inasmuch as both in my bonds, and in the defence and confirmation of the gospel, ye all are partakers of my grace.

verses.greek: μάρτυς γάρ ⸀μου ὁ θεός, ὡς ἐπιποθῶ πάντας ὑμᾶς ἐν σπλάγχνοις ⸂Χριστοῦ Ἰησοῦ⸃.
verses.mistral: Witness for me is God, as I long for all of you in the breasts of Christ Jesus.
verses.kjv: For God is my record, how greatly I long after you all in the bowels of Jesus Christ.

words.gloss: I long for, strain after, desire greatly

verses.greek: καὶ τοῦτο προσεύχομαι ἵνα ἡ ἀγάπη ὑμῶν ἔτι μᾶλλον καὶ μᾶλλον περισσεύῃ ἐν ἐπιγνώσει καὶ πάσῃ αἰσθήσει,
verses.mistral: And this I pray that your love may abound still more and more in knowledge and all discernment.
verses.kjv: And this I pray, that your love may abound yet more and more in knowledge and in all judgment;

verses.greek: εἰς τὸ δοκιμάζειν ὑμᾶς τὰ διαφέροντα, ἵνα ἦτε εἰλικρινεῖς καὶ ἀπρόσκοποι εἰς ἡμέραν Χριστοῦ,
verses.mistral: Prove yourselves authentic, that you may be approved and blameless until the day of Christ.
verses.kjv: That ye may approve things that are excellent; that ye may be sincere and without offence till the day of Christ;

words.gloss: I put to the test, prove, examine
I carry through, differ, surpass, excel

verses.greek: πεπληρωμένοι ⸂καρπὸν δικαιοσύνης τὸν⸃ διὰ Ἰησοῦ Χριστοῦ εἰς δόξαν καὶ ἔπαινον θεοῦ.
verses.mistral: Filled with the fruit of righteousness, which comes through Jesus Christ, to the glory and praise of God.
verses.kjv: Being filled with the fruits of righteousness, which are by Jesus Christ, unto the glory and praise of God.

verses.greek: Γινώσκειν δὲ ὑμᾶς βούλομαι, ἀδελφοί, ὅτι τὰ κατ’ ἐμὲ μᾶλλον εἰς προκοπὴν τοῦ εὐαγγελίου ἐλήλυθεν,
verses.mistral: I desire to know you, brethren, that what is happening concerning me has served to advance the gospel
verses.kjv: But I would ye should understand, brethren, that the things which happened unto me have fallen out rather unto the furtherance of the gospel;

words.gloss: I come to know, learn, realize
but, on the other hand, and
down from, against, according to, throughout, during

verses.greek: ὥστε τοὺς δεσμούς μου φανεροὺς ἐν Χριστῷ γενέσθαι ἐν ὅλῳ τῷ πραιτωρίῳ καὶ τοῖς λοιποῖς πᾶσιν,
verses.mistral: My chains are visible in Christ, and all the more because of my imprisonment in the praetorium.
verses.kjv: So that my bonds in Christ are manifest in all the palace, and in all other places;

words.gloss: I come into being, am born

verses.greek: καὶ τοὺς πλείονας τῶν ἀδελφῶν ἐν κυρίῳ πεποιθότας τοῖς δεσμοῖς μου περισσοτέρως τολμᾶν ἀφόβως τὸν ⸀λόγον λαλεῖν.
verses.mistral: And the more numerous brethren in the Lord, having confidence in my chains, are more bold to speak the word fearlessly.
verses.kjv: And many of the brethren in the Lord, waxing confident by my bonds, are much more bold to speak the word without fear.

verses.greek: Τινὲς μὲν καὶ διὰ φθόνον καὶ ἔριν, τινὲς δὲ καὶ δι’ εὐδοκίαν τὸν Χριστὸν κηρύσσουσιν·
verses.mistral: Some are preaching Christ out of envy and rivalry, but others out of goodwill.
verses.kjv: Some indeed preach Christ even of envy and strife; and some also of good will:

words.gloss: but, on the other hand, and

verses.greek: οἱ μὲν ἐξ ⸂ἀγάπης, εἰδότες ὅτι εἰς ἀπολογίαν τοῦ εὐαγγελίου κεῖμαι⸃,
verses.mistral: Those from love, knowing that I am set for the defense of the gospel
verses.kjv: The one preach Christ of contention, not sincerely, supposing to add affliction to my bonds:

verses.greek: οἱ δὲ ἐξ ⸂ἐριθείας τὸν Χριστὸν καταγγέλλουσιν, οὐχ ἁγνῶς, οἰόμενοι θλῖψιν ἐγείρειν τοῖς δεσμοῖς μου⸃.
verses.mistral: Opponents are proclaiming Christ, not sincerely, thinking they cause affliction to my chains.
verses.kjv: But the other of love, knowing that I am set for the defence of the gospel.

words.gloss: but, on the other hand, and

verses.greek: τί γάρ; πλὴν ⸀ὅτι παντὶ τρόπῳ, εἴτε προφάσει εἴτε ἀληθείᾳ, Χριστὸς καταγγέλλεται, καὶ ἐν τούτῳ χαίρω· ἀλλὰ καὶ χαρήσομαι,
verses.mistral: But indeed, Christ is being proclaimed, and I rejoice; yet I will also rejoice.
verses.kjv: What then? notwithstanding, every way, whether in pretence, or in truth, Christ is preached; and I therein do rejoice, yea, and will rejoice.

verses.greek: οἶδα γὰρ ὅτι τοῦτό μοι ἀποβήσεται εἰς σωτηρίαν διὰ τῆς ὑμῶν δεήσεως καὶ ἐπιχορηγίας τοῦ πνεύματος Ἰησοῦ Χριστοῦ,
verses.mistral: This will result in my salvation through your prayers and the operation of the Spirit of Jesus Christ.
verses.kjv: For I know that this shall turn to my salvation through your prayer, and the supply of the Spirit of Jesus Christ,

words.gloss: I go or come out of, disembark, result

verses.greek: κατὰ τὴν ἀποκαραδοκίαν καὶ ἐλπίδα μου ὅτι ἐν οὐδενὶ αἰσχυνθήσομαι, ἀλλ’ ἐν πάσῃ παρρησίᾳ ὡς πάντοτε καὶ νῦν μεγαλυνθήσεται Χριστὸς ἐν τῷ σώματί μου, εἴτε διὰ ζωῆς εἴτε διὰ θανάτου.
verses.mistral: My shame will not be apparent in any way, but in all boldness, Christ will be magnified in my body—whether by life or by death.
verses.kjv: According to my earnest expectation and my hope, that in nothing I shall be ashamed, but that with all boldness, as always, so now also Christ shall be magnified in my body, whether it be by life, or by death.

words.gloss: down from, against, according to, throughout, during
I am ashamed, am put to shame

verses.greek: ἐμοὶ γὰρ τὸ ζῆν Χριστὸς καὶ τὸ ἀποθανεῖν κέρδος.
verses.mistral: My living is Christ, and my dying is gain.
verses.kjv: For to me to live is Christ, and to die is gain.

words.gloss: I am dying, am about to die

verses.greek: εἰ δὲ τὸ ζῆν ἐν σαρκί, τοῦτό μοι καρπὸς ἔργου— καὶ τί αἱρήσομαι οὐ γνωρίζω·
verses.mistral: If living in flesh, that's the fruit of work - and what I shall choose, I don't know.
verses.kjv: But if I live in the flesh, this is the fruit of my labour: yet what I shall choose I wot not.

words.gloss: but, on the other hand, and

verses.greek: συνέχομαι δὲ ἐκ τῶν δύο, τὴν ἐπιθυμίαν ἔχων εἰς τὸ ἀναλῦσαι καὶ σὺν Χριστῷ εἶναι, πολλῷ ⸀γὰρ μᾶλλον κρεῖσσον,
verses.mistral: I am persuaded of this: that it is far better to depart and be with Christ; which is indeed a desirable thing.
verses.kjv: For I am in a strait betwixt two, having a desire to depart, and to be with Christ; which is far better:

words.gloss: I press together, confine, compel, am afflicted with
but, on the other hand, and

verses.greek: τὸ δὲ ἐπιμένειν ⸀ἐν τῇ σαρκὶ ἀναγκαιότερον δι’ ὑμᾶς.
verses.mistral: Remain in the flesh is necessary through you.
verses.kjv: Nevertheless to abide in the flesh is more needful for you.

words.gloss: but, on the other hand, and

verses.greek: καὶ τοῦτο πεποιθὼς οἶδα ὅτι μενῶ καὶ ⸀παραμενῶ πᾶσιν ὑμῖν εἰς τὴν ὑμῶν προκοπὴν καὶ χαρὰν τῆς πίστεως,
verses.mistral: And this I affirm, now that I know you all, remain in me and my spirit remains with you until your progress and the joy of faith.
verses.kjv: And having this confidence, I know that I shall abide and continue with you all for your furtherance and joy of faith;

verses.greek: ἵνα τὸ καύχημα ὑμῶν περισσεύῃ ἐν Χριστῷ Ἰησοῦ ἐν ἐμοὶ διὰ τῆς ἐμῆς παρουσίας πάλιν πρὸς ὑμᾶς.
verses.mistral: In order for the boast of you all to abound in Christ Jesus, through my presence again among you.
verses.kjv: That your rejoicing may be more abundant in Jesus Christ for me by my coming to you again.

words.gloss: again, further, on the other hand

verses.greek: Μόνον ἀξίως τοῦ εὐαγγελίου τοῦ Χριστοῦ πολιτεύεσθε, ἵνα εἴτε ἐλθὼν καὶ ἰδὼν ὑμᾶς εἴτε ἀπὼν ⸀ἀκούω τὰ περὶ ὑμῶν, ὅτι στήκετε ἐν ἑνὶ πνεύματι, μιᾷ ψυχῇ συναθλοῦντες τῇ πίστει τοῦ εὐαγγελίου,
verses.mistral: Only worthy of the Gospel of Christ are you citizens, so that whether I come and see you or am absent, I hear about you that you stand firm in one spirit, with one soul striving together for the faith of the Gospel.
verses.kjv: Only let your conversation be as it becometh the gospel of Christ: that whether I come and see you, or else be absent, I may hear of your affairs, that ye stand fast in one spirit, with one mind striving together for the faith of the gospel;

words.gloss: I live the life of a citizen

verses.greek: καὶ μὴ πτυρόμενοι ἐν μηδενὶ ὑπὸ τῶν ἀντικειμένων (ἥτις ⸂ἐστὶν αὐτοῖς⸃ ἔνδειξις ἀπωλείας, ⸀ὑμῶν δὲ σωτηρίας, καὶ τοῦτο ἀπὸ θεοῦ,
verses.mistral: And not being easily ensnared in anything by opponents (which is evidence of destruction for them, but of salvation for you, and this is from God).
verses.kjv: And in nothing terrified by your adversaries: which is to them an evident token of perdition, but to you of salvation, and that of God.

words.gloss: but, on the other hand, and

verses.greek: ὅτι ὑμῖν ἐχαρίσθη τὸ ὑπὲρ Χριστοῦ, οὐ μόνον τὸ εἰς αὐτὸν πιστεύειν ἀλλὰ καὶ τὸ ὑπὲρ αὐτοῦ πάσχειν),
verses.mistral: This has been granted to you not only to believe in Christ, but also to suffer for His sake.
verses.kjv: For unto you it is given in the behalf of Christ, not only to believe on him, but also to suffer for his sake;

verses.greek: τὸν αὐτὸν ἀγῶνα ἔχοντες οἷον εἴδετε ἐν ἐμοὶ καὶ νῦν ἀκούετε ἐν ἐμοί.
verses.mistral: Fighting the same battle as I am, you saw that in me and hear it now from me.
verses.kjv: Having the same conflict which ye saw in me, and now hear to be in me.

verses.greek: Εἴ τις οὖν παράκλησις ἐν Χριστῷ, εἴ τι παραμύθιον ἀγάπης, εἴ τις κοινωνία πνεύματος, εἴ τις σπλάγχνα καὶ οἰκτιρμοί,
verses.mistral: If anyone has compassion and sympathy in Christ Jesus, if anyone shares the Spirit and fellowship, if anyone has a heart and concerns:
verses.kjv: If there be therefore any consolation in Christ, if any comfort of love, if any fellowship of the Spirit, if any bowels and mercies,

verses.greek: πληρώσατέ μου τὴν χαρὰν ἵνα τὸ αὐτὸ φρονῆτε, τὴν αὐτὴν ἀγάπην ἔχοντες, σύμψυχοι, τὸ ἓν φρονοῦντες,
verses.mistral: Complete my joy so that you may think the same way, having the same love, being in agreement, thinking the same thing.
verses.kjv: Fulfil ye my joy, that ye be likeminded, having the same love, being of one accord, of one mind.

verses.greek: μηδὲν κατ’ ἐριθείαν ⸂μηδὲ κατὰ⸃ κενοδοξίαν, ἀλλὰ τῇ ταπεινοφροσύνῃ ἀλλήλους ἡγούμενοι ὑπερέχοντας ἑαυτῶν,
verses.mistral: Consider each other superior to yourselves, not looking out for your own interests, but each of you also for the interests of the others.
verses.kjv: Let nothing be done through strife or vainglory; but in lowliness of mind let each esteem other better than themselves.

words.gloss: down from, against, according to, throughout, during
down from, against, according to, throughout, during

verses.greek: μὴ τὰ ἑαυτῶν ⸀ἕκαστοι ⸀σκοποῦντες, ἀλλὰ καὶ τὰ ἑτέρων ⸁ἕκαστοι.
verses.mistral: Look not each out for his own interests, but also for the interests of others.
verses.kjv: Look not every man on his own things, but every man also on the things of others.

verses.greek: τοῦτο ⸀φρονεῖτε ἐν ὑμῖν ὃ καὶ ἐν Χριστῷ Ἰησοῦ,
verses.mistral: Consider these things in yourselves, which also you learned in Christ Jesus.
verses.kjv: Let this mind be in you, which was also in Christ Jesus:

verses.greek: ὃς ἐν μορφῇ θεοῦ ὑπάρχων οὐχ ἁρπαγμὸν ἡγήσατο τὸ εἶναι ἴσα θεῷ,
verses.mistral: Emptied (In the form of God, existing, did not consider equality with God as something to be grasped)
verses.kjv: Who, being in the form of God, thought it not robbery to be equal with God:

words.gloss: I am, exist, am in possession

verses.greek: ἀλλὰ ἑαυτὸν ἐκένωσεν μορφὴν δούλου λαβών, ἐν ὁμοιώματι ἀνθρώπων γενόμενος· καὶ σχήματι εὑρεθεὶς ὡς ἄνθρωπος
verses.mistral: He emptied Himself, taking the form of a servant, being born in the likeness of men. And being found in appearance as a man.
verses.kjv: But made himself of no reputation, and took upon him the form of a servant, and was made in the likeness of men:

words.gloss: I empty, deprive of content, make unreal
I come into being, am born

verses.greek: ἐταπείνωσεν ἑαυτὸν γενόμενος ὑπήκοος μέχρι θανάτου, θανάτου δὲ σταυροῦ·
verses.mistral: He humbled Himself, becoming obedient to death—even death on a cross.
verses.kjv: And being found in fashion as a man, he humbled himself, and became obedient unto death, even the death of the cross.

words.gloss: I come into being, am born
but, on the other hand, and

verses.greek: διὸ καὶ ὁ θεὸς αὐτὸν ὑπερύψωσεν, καὶ ἐχαρίσατο αὐτῷ ⸀τὸ ὄνομα τὸ ὑπὲρ πᾶν ὄνομα,
verses.mistral: Therefore also God highly exalted Him, and bestowed on Him the name which is above every name.
verses.kjv: Wherefore God also hath highly exalted him, and given him a name which is above every name:

verses.greek: ἵνα ἐν τῷ ὀνόματι Ἰησοῦ πᾶν γόνυ κάμψῃ ἐπουρανίων καὶ ἐπιγείων καὶ καταχθονίων,
verses.mistral: Every knee shall bow in the name of Jesus, of heaven, earth, and under the earth.
verses.kjv: That at the name of Jesus every knee should bow, of things in heaven, and things in earth, and things under the earth;

verses.greek: καὶ πᾶσα γλῶσσα ἐξομολογήσηται ὅτι κύριος Ἰησοῦς Χριστὸς εἰς δόξαν θεοῦ πατρός.
verses.mistral: And every tongue will confess that Jesus Christ is Lord, to the glory of God the Father.
verses.kjv: And that every tongue should confess that Jesus Christ is Lord, to the glory of God the Father.

verses.greek: Ὥστε, ἀγαπητοί μου, καθὼς πάντοτε ὑπηκούσατε, μὴ ὡς ἐν τῇ παρουσίᾳ μου μόνον ἀλλὰ νῦν πολλῷ μᾶλλον ἐν τῇ ἀπουσίᾳ μου, μετὰ φόβου καὶ τρόμου τὴν ἑαυτῶν σωτηρίαν κατεργάζεσθε,
verses.mistral: Work, dear ones, just as you have always obeyed, not only in my presence, but now much more in my absence, with fear and trembling, you are working for your own salvation.
verses.kjv: Wherefore, my beloved, as ye have always obeyed, not as in my presence only, but now much more in my absence, work out your own salvation with fear and trembling.

verses.greek: ⸀θεὸς γάρ ἐστιν ὁ ἐνεργῶν ἐν ὑμῖν καὶ τὸ θέλειν καὶ τὸ ἐνεργεῖν ὑπὲρ τῆς εὐδοκίας.
verses.mistral: God is working in you, both to will and to work for His good pleasure.
verses.kjv: For it is God which worketh in you both to will and to do of his good pleasure.

verses.greek: Πάντα ποιεῖτε χωρὶς γογγυσμῶν καὶ διαλογισμῶν,
verses.mistral: Do nothing out of selfish ambition or vain conceit. Instead, in humility consider others better than yourselves.
verses.kjv: Do all things without murmurings and disputings:

verses.greek: ἵνα γένησθε ἄμεμπτοι καὶ ἀκέραιοι, τέκνα θεοῦ ⸂ἄμωμα μέσον⸃ γενεᾶς σκολιᾶς καὶ διεστραμμένης, ἐν οἷς φαίνεσθε ὡς φωστῆρες ἐν κόσμῳ
verses.mistral: Blameless and innocent, children of God without blemish, in the midst of a crooked and perverse generation, among whom you shine as lights in the world.
verses.kjv: That ye may be blameless and harmless, the sons of God, without rebuke, in the midst of a crooked and perverse nation, among whom ye shine as lights in the world;

words.gloss: I come into being, am born

verses.greek: λόγον ζωῆς ἐπέχοντες, εἰς καύχημα ἐμοὶ εἰς ἡμέραν Χριστοῦ, ὅτι οὐκ εἰς κενὸν ἔδραμον οὐδὲ εἰς κενὸν ἐκοπίασα.
verses.mistral: Sharing the message of life, to my glory on the day of Christ, that I did not run in vain nor labor in vain.
verses.kjv: Holding forth the word of life; that I may rejoice in the day of Christ, that I have not run in vain, neither laboured in vain.

words.gloss: I hold forth, pay attention, note, delay

verses.greek: ἀλλὰ εἰ καὶ σπένδομαι ἐπὶ τῇ θυσίᾳ καὶ λειτουργίᾳ τῆς πίστεως ὑμῶν, χαίρω καὶ συγχαίρω πᾶσιν ὑμῖν·
verses.mistral: But if I am poured out as a drink offering on the sacrifice and service of your faith, I rejoice and share my joy with all of you.
verses.kjv: Yea, and if I be offered upon the sacrifice and service of your faith, I joy, and rejoice with you all.

words.gloss: on, to, against, on the basis of, at

verses.greek: τὸ δὲ αὐτὸ καὶ ὑμεῖς χαίρετε καὶ συγχαίρετέ μοι.
verses.mistral: You yourselves rejoice, and I also rejoice with you.
verses.kjv: For the same cause also do ye joy, and rejoice with me.

words.gloss: but, on the other hand, and

verses.greek: Ἐλπίζω δὲ ἐν κυρίῳ Ἰησοῦ Τιμόθεον ταχέως πέμψαι ὑμῖν, ἵνα κἀγὼ εὐψυχῶ γνοὺς τὰ περὶ ὑμῶν.
verses.mistral: I hope in the Lord Jesus to send Timothy to you soon, so that I may be encouraged, knowing nothing about you.
verses.kjv: But I trust in the Lord Jesus to send Timotheus shortly unto you, that I also may be of good comfort, when I know your state.

words.gloss: but, on the other hand, and
I come to know, learn, realize

verses.greek: οὐδένα γὰρ ἔχω ἰσόψυχον ὅστις γνησίως τὰ περὶ ὑμῶν μεριμνήσει,
verses.mistral: I have no one who truly cares about you as do I.
verses.kjv: For I have no man likeminded, who will naturally care for your state.

verses.greek: οἱ πάντες γὰρ τὰ ἑαυτῶν ζητοῦσιν, οὐ τὰ ⸂Ἰησοῦ Χριστοῦ⸃.
verses.mistral: All seek their own, not the things of Jesus Christ.
verses.kjv: For all seek their own, not the things which are Jesus Christ's.

verses.greek: τὴν δὲ δοκιμὴν αὐτοῦ γινώσκετε, ὅτι ὡς πατρὶ τέκνον σὺν ἐμοὶ ἐδούλευσεν εἰς τὸ εὐαγγέλιον.
verses.mistral: Recognize his trial, for as a child with me he served in the gospel.
verses.kjv: But ye know the proof of him, that, as a son with the father, he hath served with me in the gospel.

words.gloss: but, on the other hand, and
I come to know, learn, realize
I am a slave, am subject to, obey

verses.greek: τοῦτον μὲν οὖν ἐλπίζω πέμψαι ὡς ἂν ἀφίδω τὰ περὶ ἐμὲ ἐξαυτῆς·
verses.mistral: I expect to send this one, as soon as I find something that is secure concerning myself.
verses.kjv: Him therefore I hope to send presently, so soon as I shall see how it will go with me.

words.gloss: an untranslatable word that makes a statement contingent

verses.greek: πέποιθα δὲ ἐν κυρίῳ ὅτι καὶ αὐτὸς ταχέως ἐλεύσομαι.
verses.mistral: I have faith in the Lord that he himself will also quickly come.
verses.kjv: But I trust in the Lord that I also myself shall come shortly.

words.gloss: but, on the other hand, and

verses.greek: Ἀναγκαῖον δὲ ἡγησάμην Ἐπαφρόδιτον τὸν ἀδελφὸν καὶ συνεργὸν καὶ συστρατιώτην μου, ὑμῶν δὲ ἀπόστολον καὶ λειτουργὸν τῆς χρείας μου, πέμψαι πρὸς ὑμᾶς,
verses.mistral: Send Epaphroditus to you (Translated from Greek: , , )
verses.kjv: Yet I supposed it necessary to send to you Epaphroditus, my brother, and companion in labour, and fellowsoldier, but your messenger, and he that ministered to my wants.

words.gloss: but, on the other hand, and
but, on the other hand, and

verses.greek: ἐπειδὴ ἐπιποθῶν ἦν πάντας ⸀ὑμᾶς, καὶ ἀδημονῶν διότι ἠκούσατε ὅτι ἠσθένησεν.
verses.mistral: Longing for all of you, and grieved because I heard that you heard he was ill.
verses.kjv: For he longed after you all, and was full of heaviness, because that ye had heard that he had been sick.

words.gloss: I long for, strain after, desire greatly

verses.greek: καὶ γὰρ ἠσθένησεν παραπλήσιον ⸀θανάτῳ· ἀλλὰ ὁ θεὸς ⸂ἠλέησεν αὐτόν⸃, οὐκ αὐτὸν δὲ μόνον ἀλλὰ καὶ ἐμέ, ἵνα μὴ λύπην ἐπὶ λύπην σχῶ.
verses.mistral: Therefore he has been near death; but God had mercy on him, not only on him, but also on me, that there may be no further grief added to my grief.
verses.kjv: For indeed he was sick nigh unto death: but God had mercy on him; and not on him only, but on me also, lest I should have sorrow upon sorrow.

words.gloss: but, on the other hand, and
on, to, against, on the basis of, at

verses.greek: σπουδαιοτέρως οὖν ἔπεμψα αὐτὸν ἵνα ἰδόντες αὐτὸν πάλιν χαρῆτε κἀγὼ ἀλυπότερος ὦ.
verses.mistral: Therefore I have sent him more eagerly, that seeing him again you may rejoice, and I may be less sorrowful.
verses.kjv: I sent him therefore the more carefully, that, when ye see him again, ye may rejoice, and that I may be the less sorrowful.

words.gloss: again, further, on the other hand

verses.greek: προσδέχεσθε οὖν αὐτὸν ἐν κυρίῳ μετὰ πάσης χαρᾶς, καὶ τοὺς τοιούτους ἐντίμους ἔχετε,
verses.mistral: Welcome him therefore in the Lord with all joy, and honor such persons.
verses.kjv: Receive him therefore in the Lord with all gladness; and hold such in reputation:

verses.greek: ὅτι διὰ τὸ ἔργον ⸀Χριστοῦ μέχρι θανάτου ἤγγισεν, ⸀παραβολευσάμενος τῇ ψυχῇ ἵνα ἀναπληρώσῃ τὸ ὑμῶν ὑστέρημα τῆς πρός με λειτουργίας.
verses.mistral: Because of the work of Christ He came even to death, proclaiming to the soul in order to complete what is lacking in your service towards me.
verses.kjv: Because for the work of Christ he was nigh unto death, not regarding his life, to supply your lack of service toward me.

words.gloss: I fill up, make up, fulfill

verses.greek: Τὸ λοιπόν, ἀδελφοί μου, χαίρετε ἐν κυρίῳ. τὰ αὐτὰ γράφειν ὑμῖν ἐμοὶ μὲν οὐκ ὀκνηρόν, ὑμῖν δὲ ἀσφαλές.
verses.mistral: Remaining, my brethren, rejoice in the Lord. What I am writing to you is not timid but rather certain.
verses.kjv: Finally, my brethren, rejoice in the Lord. To write the same things to you, to me indeed is not grievous, but for you it is safe.

words.gloss: but, on the other hand, and

verses.greek: Βλέπετε τοὺς κύνας, βλέπετε τοὺς κακοὺς ἐργάτας, βλέπετε τὴν κατατομήν.
verses.mistral: Observe the dogs, observe the wicked workers, observe the destruction.
verses.kjv: Beware of dogs, beware of evil workers, beware of the concision.

verses.greek: ἡμεῖς γάρ ἐσμεν ἡ περιτομή, οἱ πνεύματι θεοῦ λατρεύοντες καὶ καυχώμενοι ἐν Χριστῷ Ἰησοῦ καὶ οὐκ ἐν σαρκὶ πεποιθότες,
verses.mistral: We are circumcision, we serve by the Spirit of God and boast in Christ Jesus, and not confident in the flesh.
verses.kjv: For we are the circumcision, which worship God in the spirit, and rejoice in Christ Jesus, and have no confidence in the flesh.

verses.greek: καίπερ ἐγὼ ἔχων πεποίθησιν καὶ ἐν σαρκί. Εἴ τις δοκεῖ ἄλλος πεποιθέναι ἐν σαρκί, ἐγὼ μᾶλλον·
verses.mistral: Although I have confidence also in the flesh, yet I would rather boast in my humble circumstances.
verses.kjv: Though I might also have confidence in the flesh. If any other man thinketh that he hath whereof he might trust in the flesh, I more:

words.gloss: I think, seem, appear, it seems

verses.greek: περιτομῇ ὀκταήμερος, ἐκ γένους Ἰσραήλ, φυλῆς Βενιαμίν, Ἑβραῖος ἐξ Ἑβραίων, κατὰ νόμον Φαρισαῖος,
verses.mistral: Jewish, of the tribe of Benjamin, a Hebrew, according to the law a Pharisee.
verses.kjv: Circumcised the eighth day, of the stock of Israel, of the tribe of Benjamin, an Hebrew of the Hebrews; as touching the law, a Pharisee;

words.gloss: down from, against, according to, throughout, during

verses.greek: κατὰ ⸀ζῆλος διώκων τὴν ἐκκλησίαν, κατὰ δικαιοσύνην τὴν ἐν νόμῳ γενόμενος ἄμεμπτος.
verses.mistral: Pursuing the church with zeal, justified by the law blameless.
verses.kjv: Concerning zeal, persecuting the church; touching the righteousness which is in the law, blameless.

words.gloss: down from, against, according to, throughout, during
down from, against, according to, throughout, during
I come into being, am born

verses.greek: Ἀλλὰ ἅτινα ἦν μοι κέρδη, ταῦτα ἥγημαι διὰ τὸν Χριστὸν ζημίαν.
verses.mistral: Loss became for me, regarding Christ, gain.
verses.kjv: But what things were gain to me, those I counted loss for Christ.

verses.greek: ἀλλὰ ⸀μενοῦνγε καὶ ἡγοῦμαι πάντα ζημίαν εἶναι διὰ τὸ ὑπερέχον τῆς γνώσεως Χριστοῦ Ἰησοῦ τοῦ κυρίου μου δι’ ὃν τὰ πάντα ἐζημιώθην, καὶ ἡγοῦμαι ⸀σκύβαλα ἵνα Χριστὸν κερδήσω
verses.mistral: I count all things to be loss for the sake of Christ Jesus Lord my own, on account of whom I counted all things as refuse, that I may gain Christ.
verses.kjv: Yea doubtless, and I count all things but loss for the excellency of the knowledge of Christ Jesus my Lord: for whom I have suffered the loss of all things, and do count them but dung, that I may win Christ,

verses.greek: καὶ εὑρεθῶ ἐν αὐτῷ, μὴ ἔχων ἐμὴν δικαιοσύνην τὴν ἐκ νόμου ἀλλὰ τὴν διὰ πίστεως Χριστοῦ, τὴν ἐκ θεοῦ δικαιοσύνην ἐπὶ τῇ πίστει,
verses.mistral: I will be found in Him, not having a righteousness of my own, but the righteousness that comes by faith in Christ, the righteousness from God based on faith.
verses.kjv: And be found in him, not having mine own righteousness, which is of the law, but that which is through the faith of Christ, the righteousness which is of God by faith:

words.gloss: on, to, against, on the basis of, at

verses.greek: τοῦ γνῶναι αὐτὸν καὶ τὴν δύναμιν τῆς ἀναστάσεως αὐτοῦ καὶ ⸀κοινωνίαν παθημάτων αὐτοῦ, ⸀συμμορφιζόμενος τῷ θανάτῳ αὐτοῦ,
verses.mistral: Knowing Him and the power of His resurrection and the fellowship of His sufferings, becoming like Him in death.
verses.kjv: That I may know him, and the power of his resurrection, and the fellowship of his sufferings, being made conformable unto his death;

words.gloss: I come to know, learn, realize

verses.greek: εἴ πως καταντήσω εἰς τὴν ἐξανάστασιν ⸂τὴν ἐκ⸃ νεκρῶν.
verses.mistral: If possibly I attain to the resurrection from among the dead.
verses.kjv: If by any means I might attain unto the resurrection of the dead.

words.gloss: I come down, arrive at, reach

verses.greek: Οὐχ ὅτι ἤδη ἔλαβον ἢ ἤδη τετελείωμαι, διώκω δὲ εἰ καὶ καταλάβω, ἐφ’ ᾧ καὶ κατελήμφθην ὑπὸ ⸀Χριστοῦ.
verses.mistral: Pursue what you have already obtained, that I may also be found in Him.
verses.kjv: Not as though I had already attained, either were already perfect: but I follow after, if that I may apprehend that for which also I am apprehended of Christ Jesus.

words.gloss: but, on the other hand, and
I seize tight hold of, overtake, comprehend
on, to, against, on the basis of, at
I seize tight hold of, overtake, comprehend

verses.greek: ἀδελφοί, ἐγὼ ἐμαυτὸν ⸀οὐ λογίζομαι κατειληφέναι· ἓν δέ, τὰ μὲν ὀπίσω ἐπιλανθανόμενος τοῖς δὲ ἔμπροσθεν ἐπεκτεινόμενος,
verses.mistral: Brothers, I do not consider myself yet to have taken hold of it. Yet, what we have already obtained, with regard to the things behind, I forget, but reaching forward to those things ahead, I pursue as well.
verses.kjv: Brethren, I count not myself to have apprehended: but this one thing I do, forgetting those things which are behind, and reaching forth unto those things which are before,

words.gloss: I seize tight hold of, overtake, comprehend
but, on the other hand, and
but, on the other hand, and

verses.greek: κατὰ σκοπὸν διώκω ⸀εἰς τὸ βραβεῖον τῆς ἄνω κλήσεως τοῦ θεοῦ ἐν Χριστῷ Ἰησοῦ.
verses.mistral: Pursuing the prize of the upward call of God in Christ Jesus.
verses.kjv: I press toward the mark for the prize of the high calling of God in Christ Jesus.

words.gloss: down from, against, according to, throughout, during

verses.greek: ὅσοι οὖν τέλειοι, τοῦτο φρονῶμεν· καὶ εἴ τι ἑτέρως φρονεῖτε, καὶ τοῦτο ὁ θεὸς ὑμῖν ἀποκαλύψει·
verses.mistral: Those who are mature, this we think, and if in any other way you think, that also God will reveal to you
verses.kjv: Let us therefore, as many as be perfect, be thus minded: and if in any thing ye be otherwise minded, God shall reveal even this unto you.

words.gloss: I uncover, bring to light, reveal

verses.greek: πλὴν εἰς ὃ ἐφθάσαμεν, τῷ αὐτῷ ⸀στοιχεῖν.
verses.mistral: Join in following my example, and observe those who walk according to the pattern we gave you.
verses.kjv: Nevertheless, whereto we have already attained, let us walk by the same rule, let us mind the same thing.

verses.greek: Συμμιμηταί μου γίνεσθε, ἀδελφοί, καὶ σκοπεῖτε τοὺς οὕτω περιπατοῦντας καθὼς ἔχετε τύπον ἡμᾶς·
verses.mistral: Follow my example, and imitate those who, as you have a pattern in us.
verses.kjv: Brethren, be followers together of me, and mark them which walk so as ye have us for an ensample.

words.gloss: I come into being, am born

verses.greek: πολλοὶ γὰρ περιπατοῦσιν οὓς πολλάκις ἔλεγον ὑμῖν, νῦν δὲ καὶ κλαίων λέγω, τοὺς ἐχθροὺς τοῦ σταυροῦ τοῦ Χριστοῦ,
verses.mistral: Many are walking whom I often told you about; now, even as I grieve, I say, the enemies of the cross of Christ.
verses.kjv: (For many walk, of whom I have told you often, and now tell you even weeping, that they are the enemies of the cross of Christ:

words.gloss: but, on the other hand, and

verses.greek: ὧν τὸ τέλος ἀπώλεια, ὧν ὁ θεὸς ἡ κοιλία καὶ ἡ δόξα ἐν τῇ αἰσχύνῃ αὐτῶν, οἱ τὰ ἐπίγεια φρονοῦντες.
verses.mistral: Their end is destruction, whose God is their belly, and whose glory is in their shame, who mind earthly things.
verses.kjv: Whose end is destruction, whose God is their belly, and whose glory is in their shame, who mind earthly things.)

verses.greek: ἡμῶν γὰρ τὸ πολίτευμα ἐν οὐρανοῖς ὑπάρχει, ἐξ οὗ καὶ σωτῆρα ἀπεκδεχόμεθα κύριον Ἰησοῦν Χριστόν,
verses.mistral: Our citizenship is in heaven, from which we eagerly wait for a Savior, the Lord Jesus Christ.
verses.kjv: For our conversation is in heaven; from whence also we look for the Saviour, the Lord Jesus Christ:

words.gloss: I am, exist, am in possession
I expect eagerly, wait for eagerly

verses.greek: ὃς μετασχηματίσει τὸ σῶμα τῆς ταπεινώσεως ⸀ἡμῶν σύμμορφον τῷ σώματι τῆς δόξης αὐτοῦ κατὰ τὴν ἐνέργειαν τοῦ δύνασθαι αὐτὸν καὶ ὑποτάξαι ⸀αὑτῷ τὰ πάντα.
verses.mistral: Who will transform the body of our humble state into conformity with the body of His glory, by the working ability to do so, and subject all things to Himself.
verses.kjv: Who shall change our vile body, that it may be fashioned like unto his glorious body, according to the working whereby he is able even to subdue all things unto himself.

words.gloss: I change the outward appearance, transfigure, adapt
down from, against, according to, throughout, during

verses.greek: ὥστε, ἀδελφοί μου ἀγαπητοὶ καὶ ἐπιπόθητοι, χαρὰ καὶ στέφανός μου, οὕτως στήκετε ἐν κυρίῳ, ἀγαπητοί.
verses.mistral: Therefore, my beloved and longed-for brethren, rejoice in the Lord, cherished ones.
verses.kjv: Therefore, my brethren dearly beloved and longed for, my joy and crown, so stand fast in the Lord, my dearly beloved.

verses.greek: Εὐοδίαν παρακαλῶ καὶ Συντύχην παρακαλῶ τὸ αὐτὸ φρονεῖν ἐν κυρίῳ.
verses.mistral: I beseech Euodia and Syntyche to think the same in the Lord.
verses.kjv: I beseech Euodias, and beseech Syntyche, that they be of the same mind in the Lord.

verses.greek: ναὶ ἐρωτῶ καὶ σέ, ⸂γνήσιε σύζυγε⸃, συλλαμβάνου αὐταῖς, αἵτινες ἐν τῷ εὐαγγελίῳ συνήθλησάν μοι μετὰ καὶ Κλήμεντος καὶ τῶν λοιπῶν συνεργῶν μου, ὧν τὰ ὀνόματα ἐν βίβλῳ ζωῆς.
verses.mistral: I also appeal to you, helper of Clement, join with them, who worked together with me in the gospel, whose names are in the book of life.
verses.kjv: And I intreat thee also, true yokefellow, help those women which laboured with me in the gospel, with Clement also, and with other my fellowlabourers, whose names are in the book of life.

verses.greek: Χαίρετε ἐν κυρίῳ πάντοτε· πάλιν ἐρῶ, χαίρετε.
verses.mistral: Rejoice in the Lord always; again I will say, rejoice.
verses.kjv: Rejoice in the Lord alway: and again I say, Rejoice.

words.gloss: again, further, on the other hand

verses.greek: τὸ ἐπιεικὲς ὑμῶν γνωσθήτω πᾶσιν ἀνθρώποις. ὁ κύριος ἐγγύς·
verses.mistral: Your kindness is known to all people. The Lord is near.
verses.kjv: Let your moderation be known unto all men. The Lord is at hand.

words.gloss: I come to know, learn, realize

verses.greek: μηδὲν μεριμνᾶτε, ἀλλ’ ἐν παντὶ τῇ προσευχῇ καὶ τῇ δεήσει μετ’ εὐχαριστίας τὰ αἰτήματα ὑμῶν γνωριζέσθω πρὸς τὸν θεόν·
verses.mistral: Do not worry about anything, but in everything, through prayer and petition with thanksgiving, let your requests be made known to God.
verses.kjv: Be careful for nothing; but in every thing by prayer and supplication with thanksgiving let your requests be made known unto God.

verses.greek: καὶ ἡ εἰρήνη τοῦ θεοῦ ἡ ὑπερέχουσα πάντα νοῦν φρουρήσει τὰς καρδίας ὑμῶν καὶ τὰ νοήματα ὑμῶν ἐν Χριστῷ Ἰησοῦ.
verses.mistral: The peace of God, which surpasses all understanding, will guard your hearts and minds in Christ Jesus.
verses.kjv: And the peace of God, which passeth all understanding, shall keep your hearts and minds through Christ Jesus.

verses.greek: Τὸ λοιπόν, ἀδελφοί, ὅσα ἐστὶν ἀληθῆ, ὅσα σεμνά, ὅσα δίκαια, ὅσα ἁγνά, ὅσα προσφιλῆ, ὅσα εὔφημα, εἴ τις ἀρετὴ καὶ εἴ τις ἔπαινος, ταῦτα λογίζεσθε·
verses.mistral: Consider all that is true, noble, just, pure, lovely, commendable, if there is any excellence or praise, think about these things.
verses.kjv: Finally, brethren, whatsoever things are true, whatsoever things are honest, whatsoever things are just, whatsoever things are pure, whatsoever things are lovely, whatsoever things are of good report; if there be any virtue, and if there be any praise, think on these things.

verses.greek: ἃ καὶ ἐμάθετε καὶ παρελάβετε καὶ ἠκούσατε καὶ εἴδετε ἐν ἐμοί, ταῦτα πράσσετε· καὶ ὁ θεὸς τῆς εἰρήνης ἔσται μεθ’ ὑμῶν.
verses.mistral: Learn and receive, hear and see these things in me, do them; and the God of peace will be with you.
verses.kjv: Those things, which ye have both learned, and received, and heard, and seen in me, do: and the God of peace shall be with you.

verses.greek: Ἐχάρην δὲ ἐν κυρίῳ μεγάλως ὅτι ἤδη ποτὲ ἀνεθάλετε τὸ ὑπὲρ ἐμοῦ φρονεῖν, ἐφ’ ᾧ καὶ ἐφρονεῖτε ἠκαιρεῖσθε δέ.
verses.mistral: Delighted greatly in the Lord that you have already thought of me, and you also think this at the right time.
verses.kjv: But I rejoiced in the Lord greatly, that now at the last your care of me hath flourished again; wherein ye were also careful, but ye lacked opportunity.

words.gloss: but, on the other hand, and
on, to, against, on the basis of, at
I am without a suitable opportunity
but, on the other hand, and

verses.greek: οὐχ ὅτι καθ’ ὑστέρησιν λέγω, ἐγὼ γὰρ ἔμαθον ἐν οἷς εἰμι αὐτάρκης εἶναι·
verses.mistral: Not because I lack, but I have learned to be content.
verses.kjv: Not that I speak in respect of want: for I have learned, in whatsoever state I am, therewith to be content.

words.gloss: down from, against, according to, throughout, during

verses.greek: οἶδα καὶ ταπεινοῦσθαι, οἶδα καὶ περισσεύειν· ἐν παντὶ καὶ ἐν πᾶσιν μεμύημαι, καὶ χορτάζεσθαι καὶ πεινᾶν, καὶ περισσεύειν καὶ ὑστερεῖσθαι·
verses.mistral: I have learned to be abased, and I have learned to abound: everywhere and in all things I am able to be content.
verses.kjv: I know both how to be abased, and I know how to abound: every where and in all things I am instructed both to be full and to be hungry, both to abound and to suffer need.

words.gloss: I am lacking, fall short, suffer need

verses.greek: πάντα ἰσχύω ἐν τῷ ἐνδυναμοῦντί ⸀με.
verses.mistral: I am able in all things.
verses.kjv: I can do all things through Christ which strengtheneth me.

verses.greek: πλὴν καλῶς ἐποιήσατε συγκοινωνήσαντές μου τῇ θλίψει.
verses.mistral: You have translated well, sharing in my affliction.
verses.kjv: Notwithstanding ye have well done, that ye did communicate with my affliction.

verses.greek: Οἴδατε δὲ καὶ ὑμεῖς, Φιλιππήσιοι, ὅτι ἐν ἀρχῇ τοῦ εὐαγγελίου, ὅτε ἐξῆλθον ἀπὸ Μακεδονίας, οὐδεμία μοι ἐκκλησία ἐκοινώνησεν εἰς λόγον δόσεως καὶ λήμψεως εἰ μὴ ὑμεῖς μόνοι,
verses.mistral: You yourselves, Philippians, know that at the first preaching of the gospel, when I departed from Macedonia, no church shared with me concerning a gift and a fellowship in giving and receiving, except you only.
verses.kjv: Now ye Philippians know also, that in the beginning of the gospel, when I departed from Macedonia, no church communicated with me as concerning giving and receiving, but ye only.

words.gloss: but, on the other hand, and
I share, communicate, have fellowship with

verses.greek: ὅτι καὶ ἐν Θεσσαλονίκῃ καὶ ἅπαξ καὶ δὶς εἰς τὴν χρείαν μοι ἐπέμψατε.
verses.mistral: You sent to me once and twice, to my need, to Thessalonica.
verses.kjv: For even in Thessalonica ye sent once and again unto my necessity.

verses.greek: οὐχ ὅτι ἐπιζητῶ τὸ δόμα, ἀλλὰ ἐπιζητῶ τὸν καρπὸν τὸν πλεονάζοντα εἰς λόγον ὑμῶν.
verses.mistral: I seek not just the gift, but the increase of the fruit for your account.
verses.kjv: Not because I desire a gift: but I desire fruit that may abound to your account.

words.gloss: I seek after, desire, search for
I seek after, desire, search for

verses.greek: ἀπέχω δὲ πάντα καὶ περισσεύω· πεπλήρωμαι δεξάμενος παρὰ Ἐπαφροδίτου τὰ παρ’ ὑμῶν, ὀσμὴν εὐωδίας, θυσίαν δεκτήν, εὐάρεστον τῷ θεῷ.
verses.mistral: I hold all things as loss for the sake of Christ. Indeed, I count everything as waste, so that I may gain Christ and be found in him, not having a righteousness derived from the law but that which comes through faith in Christ—a righteousness recognized by God, and considered worthy of God's acceptance, an offering pleasing to God. (Philippians 3:8-9, for context) English Translation: I hold all things as loss; indeed, I count everything as dung so that I may gain Christ, and be found in him, not having a righteousness derived from the law but that which comes through faith in Christ—a righteousness recognized by God, and considered worthy of God's acceptance, an offering pleasing to God.
verses.kjv: But I have all, and abound: I am full, having received of Epaphroditus the things which were sent from you, an odour of a sweet smell, a sacrifice acceptable, wellpleasing to God.

words.gloss: I have in full, am far, it is enough
but, on the other hand, and

verses.greek: ὁ δὲ θεός μου πληρώσει πᾶσαν χρείαν ὑμῶν κατὰ ⸂τὸ πλοῦτος⸃ αὐτοῦ ἐν δόξῃ ἐν Χριστῷ Ἰησοῦ.
verses.mistral: God will supply all your needs according to the wealth of Him in glory in Christ Jesus.
verses.kjv: But my God shall supply all your need according to his riches in glory by Christ Jesus.

words.gloss: but, on the other hand, and
down from, against, according to, throughout, during

verses.greek: τῷ δὲ θεῷ καὶ πατρὶ ἡμῶν ἡ δόξα εἰς τοὺς αἰῶνας τῶν αἰώνων· ἀμήν.
verses.mistral: To God and Father be glory forevermore. Amen.
verses.kjv: Now unto God and our Father be glory for ever and ever. Amen.

words.gloss: but, on the other hand, and
verily, truly, amen, so let it be

verses.greek: Ἀσπάσασθε πάντα ἅγιον ἐν Χριστῷ Ἰησοῦ. ἀσπάζονται ὑμᾶς οἱ σὺν ἐμοὶ ἀδελφοί.
verses.mistral: Greet every saint in Christ Jesus. Those who are with me, the brethren, greet you.
verses.kjv: Salute every saint in Christ Jesus. The brethren which are with me greet you.

words.gloss: I greet, salute, pay my respects to
I greet, salute, pay my respects to

verses.greek: ἀσπάζονται ὑμᾶς πάντες οἱ ἅγιοι, μάλιστα δὲ οἱ ἐκ τῆς Καίσαρος οἰκίας.
verses.mistral: All the saints send you greetings, especially those from Caesar's household.
verses.kjv: All the saints salute you, chiefly they that are of Caesar's household.

words.gloss: I greet, salute, pay my respects to
but, on the other hand, and

verses.greek: ἡ χάρις τοῦ κυρίου Ἰησοῦ Χριστοῦ μετὰ ⸂τοῦ πνεύματος⸃ ⸀ὑμῶν.
verses.mistral: The grace of the Lord Jesus Christ be with you.
verses.kjv: The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ be with you all. Amen.
